description: Real-world city arts & rec spring registration announcement with specific open date/time - borderline calendar event

events.title: Spring 2026 Registration Opens
events.description: Spring 2026 registration opens for Arts + Rec classes including youth programs, preschool, adult classes, and intergenerational programs

events.title: Spring 2026 Arts + Rec Registration Opens
events.description: Spring 2026 registration for Walnut Creek Arts + Rec opens Friday, February 18, 2026 at 12:00 PM. Classes are viewable online prior to registration; use 5-digit course numbers when registering. To register online view offerings via the Activity Guide/website. To register by phone contact Customer Support at 925-295-1490 and reference the course number. Email artsrec@walnutcreekca.gov with questions. Printed copies of the Activity Guide will be available for pickup (limited quantities, while supplies last) at: Civic Park Community Center (1375 Civic Drive); Tice Valley Gym (2055 Tice Valley Boulevard); Shadelands Art Center (111 N. Wiget Lane); Walnut Creek City Hall (1666 N. Main Street).

events.title: Community Arts Preschool Registration Opens (Summer 2026 & 2026–27)
events.description: Registration for Community Arts Preschool (Summer 2026 and School Year 2026–27) opens Wednesday, February 18, 2026 at 12:00 PM as part of Arts + Rec Spring registration. See the Activity Guide (preschool section) for program details and course numbers. To register online use the course number; to register by phone call Customer Support at 925-295-1490. Email artsrec@walnutcreekca.gov with questions.
